violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -Prep cooler at 42-44F.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need more thorough cleaning.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Kitchen flooring has small tears.
